今日都無出現返個chat room
以後一定要揀chat now

第一次喺度留言。

大家要調整好自己心態, 先可以吸引到一個啱自己嘅人。 如果對方傾傾下消失左, 你要理解, 對方係無對你唔住,只係你哋唔適合。所以唔好太在意!

我勸大家唔好將太多時間同心力放哂喺一個人身上, 要將雞蛋放喺唔同籃子入面, 增加自己認識其他人嘅機會。

玩得app, 外表係好重要, 你無一張正正常常嘅相, 又邊會有人想了解你嘅內在, 如果有人好耐都無match, 不如試試換過張相, 或者叫frd幫你影d 呃like相。

say the following to your girlfriend: You're gorgeous cute and pretty. You're the best thing that has ever happened to me. Your love is what keeps me going every day. It's awesome to spend my life with you. I'm looking forward to spending the rest of our lives together. Last night I sent an angel to look over you as you slept. The angel returned to me and when I asked why? The angel said that angels do not watch over angels. Thos afternoon I went to the hospital and got an x-ray, do you know what they found? You in my heart. The doctor said my heart will always be fine with you in it.

replies.msg: My friend Ken has been having a crush on this girl named Jo for seven years but Jo has a boyfriend. His friend said "That's totally fair. She's quite attractive" But he's beginning to realise he has no place in her scheme of things. He's just being a doormat so I told him to forget her. She's just not worth it. His brother said "You would be better off without her" His mum too said "You'll be better off without her" He works as an accounting manager at Hilton but if he takes the job in Big 4 he'll be four thousand dollars a month better off but he's still better off now than he was two years ago when he was working below everybody else in the department. He thinks a junior accountant position is beneath him. If he hadn't taken the CPA exam two years ago he wouldn't be working as a manager now. He's a science fiction fan. He said "If scientists really would invent a starship I would quit my job and spend the rest of my life roaming the universe" Recently his sister married her childhood sweetheart. Her dad felt she was marrying beneath her though. Her uncle feels her husband is beneath her too. She enjoys socialising with the better off. Two months ago Ken was away on a business trip to Hokkaido. I said "If you should go there again can you get me this pack of chocolate?" Ken is a computer expert. His cousin has to write a report which is due on Tuesday but he's having problems with his computer. If Ken will go and fix his computer he'll be so thankful for his help. He also has exams next Monday so he's better off revising at home this weekend. Ken is a kickboxing fan. His favourite fighter Dan won his retirement fight recently. He's deeply grateful to his coaches and thankful that he got a job as a colour commentator after he retired from the sport. All the fans wanna see Fred versus Randy. If Fred would sign a contract with the organisation Dana will make the fight happen. Ken's brother works as a concierge in a hotel. Ken said "if it will make you happy I'll come to stay for a night as company for you while your colleagues are away" He gave a house party last month. His television is cheap and nasty. As everyone wants to watch the news I said "If I could turn the television on please" He then said "sure. If you would switch to the news channel" I've seen Joey live twice. The first time I saw her concert we were late. I said "Look at the time. The concert will have started" It was quarter past eight. The concert would've started by then. By next century scientists scientists will have invented a starship. I need to ask professor chan something so I'm going to wait outside the lecture room at six. He'll have finished his lecture.
